title: Mid-Level Visual Merchandiser at Zara India Digital Technologies

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Visual Merchandiser at Zara India Digital Technologies
jsonLd.description:
Zara India Digital Technologies invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Visual Merchandiser at our Dhanbad location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Zara India Digital Technologies:
Zara India Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Zara India Digital Technologies!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
